title: senecio oxyriifolius subsp. oxyriifolius
intro: Senecio oxyriifolius subsp. oxyriifolius, also known as the 'Makomakoa' or 'Whistling Thistle', is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio oxyriifolius subsp. oxyriifolius include its potential to soothe coughs, ease congestion, and reduce inflammation in the body. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of this plant were used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
